description_long: This is a single-story bungalow situated within a spacious, fenced yard featuring a mix of mature trees, shrubs, and manicured lawns. The bungalow itself has a dark, gabled roof with multiple intersecting sections and light-colored exterior walls, complemented by a prominent front porch. The property includes a paved driveway leading to a detached garage and a secondary outbuilding, as well as a backyard patio area with outdoor furniture. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with several grouped on the sides and a few facing the front. The surrounding landscape is lush, with a variety of coniferous and deciduous trees providing shade and privacy. The overall setting suggests a suburban or semi-rural residential environment, designed for comfort and outdoor living.
description: A single-story bungalow with a dark gabled roof, light exterior walls, and a prominent front porch, set in a large, landscaped yard with trees, a driveway, and outbuildings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, front porch, driveway, and a clear view of the landscaped yard and fencing.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the backyard, detached garage, secondary outbuilding, and more of the tree coverage.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the backyard patio, outbuildings, and the arrangement of trees and shrubs behind the bungalow.
description_view_3: Angled side view showing the side of the bungalow, front porch, and a mix of trees and open lawn.
